name: Julian Brave NoiseCat
subject: Interior Secretary Deb Haaland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I am thankful.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5254%2E53494%2EGAQ5Uh) Friend, Today is a good day. After four years of fossil fuel executives and lobbyists opening up Native lands and sacred sites to industry tycoons, the next Secretary of Interior will be Rep. Deb Haaland, a Laguna Pueblo woman who went to Standing Rock in 2016 and cooked for the people. She is going to make our ancestors so proud. **[If you're half as joyful as I am right now, add your name today to thank President-elect Biden for this historic appointment and for doing something so undoubtedly right.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1338?t=3&akid=5254%2E53494%2EGAQ5Uh)** Haaland will oversee the federal government's nation-to-nation relationship with the 574 federally recognized American Indian and Alaska Native tribal communities and be the first-ever Native Cabinet Secretary in the nation's history. I am thankful to all those who have been pushing for this appointment alongside me—it took many leaders and a small army—and to Joe Biden for hearing us. With this appointment, the President-elect has taken a modest but meaningful step toward justice for First peoples. He is continuing to set a tone for restoring a sense of public good and public trust to America, and that is worth celebrating. **[Add your name today to thank the president-elect for making history.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1338?t=4&akid=5254%2E53494%2EGAQ5Uh)** With gratitude to the countless people from across Indian Country, the environmental movement, and the political spectrum, Julian Brave NoiseCat
Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie
Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action
Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1338?t=5&akid=5254%2E53494%2EGAQ5Uh)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5254%2E53494%2EGAQ5Uh). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

clean_body: I am thankful. | Friend, Today is a good day. After four years of fossil fuel executives and lobbyists opening up Native lands and sacred sites to industry tycoons, the next Secretary of Interior will be Rep. Deb Haaland, a Laguna Pueblo woman who went to Standing Rock in 2016 and cooked for the people. She is going to make our ancestors so proud. Haaland will oversee the federal government's nation-to-nation relationship with the 574 federally recognized American Indian and Alaska Native tribal communities and be the first-ever Native Cabinet Secretary in the nation's history. I am thankful to all those who have been pushing for this appointment alongside me—it took many leaders and a small army—and to Joe Biden for hearing us. With this appointment, the President-elect has taken a modest but meaningful step toward justice for First peoples. He is continuing to set a tone for restoring a sense of public good and public trust to America, and that is worth celebrating. With gratitude to the countless people from across Indian Country, the environmental movement, and the political spectrum, Julian Brave NoiseCat Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress |

Instead, we ran the table in swing seats, picking up at least a dozen and **putting major pressure on Nancy Pelosi, AOC and their liberal agenda.**[**Click here to read my full interview:**](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xkidha-ahkdjtlkr-i/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xkidha-ahkdjtlkr-d/) The next two years are going to be a wake-up call for the liberals who think they have a mandate from the American people. name: Caitlin O'Dea (Team Kelly)
subject: BREAKING: WARNOCK HOSTED JEREMIAH WRIGHT AS GUEST PREACHER IN 2014
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
|

---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, DECEMBER 18, 2020
BREAKING: WARNOCK HOSTED JEREMIAH WRIGHT AS GUEST PREACHER IN 2014
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, a newly unearthed flyer [revealed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhFs9D7e8-N_5HDIgHUUqN3mytRfKkz9k0S4wCT2lWWJnHzJ9eKMHUit11AZw4n5fYu06TRv5b2998khbHm7dOhwJrRQCAve-6Rp8RY_cQKZ-ABMrMpmH6p02GDZWN50mCljMOUTXTDppEzHX7lEQcP_KAATdYNMDV&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) that Raphael Warnock hosted [anti-Semitic](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhjq0bduzsC9kxLFKUvONSaQCym6BY1XwMpcbBtMbNU__LVDH_pwtSR6mFw3PAVOGPHUmZHQrvRNT6KZjwAWk-A_uP8xgQtcKVYFVfxAw5ioY=&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==), [anti-American](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37YztaniYvF4QMe-judzZq8tLR6utcszWg0-MK-h46DzY5wC3KA5qjBTSd-GhrmFFEATlqJxm7Ji7I3AIeS6evDmDvS5JgXgXxDQZRZS8Mix6Bg-zTe4Ba3k0mj5EcZ07UgiSFtkgEoKTTuRWJWPXL-4vTql1dwoy-fqg==&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) preacher Jeremiah Wright at Ebenezer Baptist Church in 2014. As first [reported](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhFs9D7e8-N_5HDIgHUUqN3mytRfKkz9k0S4wCT2lWWJnHzJ9eKMHUit11AZw4n5fYu06TRv5b2998khbHm7dOhwJrRQCAve-6Rp8RY_cQKZ-ABMrMpmH6p02GDZWN50mCljMOUTXTDppEzHX7lEQcP_KAATdYNMDV&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) by Fox News, Wright served as a guest speaker during Warnock's "Fall Fire: A Revival Experience" event." Warnock has a long history of praising Wright, [calling](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhFShq8pbDfhjbb03x5ucI67OAKL5w4eyiYnOsR4zboCQGs58Yanpc2RSK1xBdNBGWjvGB4B8DswsXKGEE9SaDTLczLPJxa4pakq9HHl2JDF_AKIORzSBixw==&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) him a "prophet" and [celebrating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhFShq8pbDfhjbb03x5ucI67OAKL5w4eyiYnOsR4zboCQGs58Yanpc2RSK1xBdNBGWjvGB4B8DswsXKGEE9SaDTLczLPJxa4pakq9HHl2JDF_AKIORzSBixw==&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) his infamous "God Damn America" speech days after it was delivered. And Warnock himself has [repeatedly](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhR4rPubrXipnvaREM7C2NesnMVvPuKLe1g45iKt9zuu_EmHxihLvEhDWPIKhXSd--4F7AVMR4kuJzTovIMqhqWUvb6rnQsPxeYgpNVnZxobkkokue3J2iulBsCfn-c6l4tmEp0tvt8xw=&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) [said](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhtwbJasmRfFLJVGHOL_Sf7bJJhaqJf95_Rx-lri1fRIwo9GAtdxhyBkaKTnkPsx9cqoHUD-4aVJ0v-_JUHx-RbebdHa1LqgFVIq5kQvXV-iAebGHoIZbV0DWscSHV59pq_1ZEzTduEZnw8CwbGyswDSokhb4JHpYHUTkbK-CD_CE=&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==) "God Damn America" in his sermons.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yzk7AocpwZiMhfOohV0dP4VnbPPX67VnlfnVLRoOOwGN02gokrwEopSiP0fMamciGK_3tnVO0E9pVD0mJQH67NKTdumI0VaM0WUM5os9wc7jfU6Rzsi2CJfLgNbkfLKeqJy3m3vGhEZ_mS8LmkfUfQJpvj6iTlD_U22T7SzotY7iGGtjJFpaz_T82TRoMgLGibA==&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==)

| "Not only did Raphael Warnock praise Jeremiah Wright's 'God Damn America' sermon, he thought it was so great that he invited him to Ebenezer Baptist to deliver it," said Deputy Campaign Manager Stephen Lawson. "Does Georgia really want a U.S. Senator who thinks God should damn America? That's what they'll get if they vote for Raphael Warnock."
### Caitlin O'Dea Press Secretary [caitlin@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_ggw0fHG69BkirWKem_X8gX1A6A3ibVmQGZd7_8r5SCeuh9EQ37Yztz9Hf2eljh1D9iuemLbywctsC7x56NlSDP6fCkfxeJ0H-R_IVZychaa_Ocu5ManLuwUM6sGASYP5wAIo1v20hQHOOZtE-6L6I66Nm_WfCRF&c=HjhTn8kvZagpV6lzrNi7z3Juvgl0A9kXKRQYSclO1GOR1Up8Qjkskg==&ch=J6AlxXcU2swwHoGE-IHppTcvLjzceIepYvjnCen0hy_VKFzjCXAGbQ==)

name: Greg Stanton
subject: Seasons Givings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Friend,

From my family to yours, I would like to extend my sincerest wishes for a safe and happy holiday. One of the ways that my family and I like to spend this time of togetherness is by giving back to those who are not as fortunate. During this especially hectic year, I am eager to support Phoenix's own St. Mary's Food Bank. St. Mary's serves the Phoenix area and 9 Arizona counties, bringing relief to the over 2 million Arizonans who face food insecurity each day.

[**Will you join me in making a contribution this holiday season to St. Mary 's Food Bank?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rZWgO7SPpRe2wFYbBsq8Cg4CaUgq82uToMZhFb2uwIE=/3117cYGFzKxp485TN6XXRB1b2PkABwXeIuBCTu9rNoE=?df_id=7862&7862.donation=form1&_ga=2.170051360.1245846506.1607714751-327642923.1607714751)

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE JOIN GEORGIA REPUBLICANS' CALL FOR SEPARATE REVIEW OF BALLOTS CAST BY NEWLY REGISTERED VOTERS TO PROTECT ONE PERSON, ONE VOTE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE FRIDAY, DECEMBER 18, 2020
SENATORS LOEFFLER, PERDUE JOIN GEORGIA REPUBLICANS' CALL FOR SEPARATE REVIEW OF BALLOTS CAST BY NEWLY REGISTERED VOTERS TO PROTECT ONE PERSON, ONE VOTE
ATLANTA \- In an ongoing effort to protect Georgians' right to "one person, one vote," Senators Loeffler and Perdue joined Georgia Republicans supporting a new lawsuit seeking to address double-voting issues by putting aside ballots cast by newly registered voters who already voted for U.S. Senate in another state this year. Senators Loeffler and Perdue issued the following statement: "There is too much at stake in these elections for there to be any doubt in the integrity and transparency of their outcomes. Georgians will not tolerate double-voting and failures to address out-of-state voters attempting to influence the results of these elections. Immediate action is required to ensure that doesn't occur. We must secure the accuracy and integrity of the January run-offs, because all legal Georgia votes must be counted."
Given the threat of illegal double-voting, the Secretary of State's failure to compile and release a complete list of newly registered voters, and the push for individuals to move to Georgia to alter the results of the January run-offs, ballots from new registrants must be separated in order to determine that they did not already vote for another state's U.S. Senator in the 2020 election before their votes are counted. Senators Loeffler and Perdue are not requesting that the Court preclude any lawful voter from casting a ballot. The Secretary of State must require such action before ballots are processed, or else illegal ballots will be impossible to remedy, undermining the integrity of the January 5 run-offs.
---
| ### Stephen Lawson Deputy Campaign Manager [stephen@kellyforsenate.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u5sVVWp_LMeLUkF1Iuw-Y24Jn3zY7QuFQuN9oViO6p1hjYZFMueTJFDWx1PvnTE1hpyOvj58o2Xk1VGNhlsBDS0WPfammEnCIUiVmVlXLAD5FYsueZx7qbfusF86t6ZaHzUrd1s8vbuv8cLvqSL8CQipm1bmw-nL&c=YzKo68Mkb9Gg_Y_A0u338-BkRN-fzh57Y7cWIyBUOF9MBxX5oajBJQ==&ch=sfVKy_5_GRYElKppHc_H8LPATTPb1zdDNtrhWryZZnWaxt6QxS_r6A==)
---
|
Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler

English is my third language and I came to America as a young woman searching for opportunity. Instead, I watched my single-mother be taken advantage of by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill simply because she lacked the resources to fight it.

My accent is part of my story and my story is the exact reason Democrats don't want me in Congress. As a proud conservative woman and first-generation American, I'm a threat to their narrative. They'll spend whatever it takes to defeat me and crush conservatives in California. It's up to us to stop them.

body:
Despite her narrow majority, Nancy Pelosi's Far Left agenda will not slow down. From a government healthcare takeover to the Green New Deal, all Americans will suffer. But Young Kim and I intend to stop that.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3X0jKsm7gDgaDv2rvPValV62qSKpgpwF8rUKcwyH6D-lXKAD_Je3QkHMRj6oI9UB6JbRQUmSOwNRNWbyAxgXpb_pZStNrQsqIlym31MXXU_ZojE5Xdud9BKVmqyu5hkZvYOH-I-nLc_4yS-2ACKBNg9cP_XRt3JcVglaC50lTS0z-MNtGgPemQLhUqz38y7rFpKX4Syh-Pddk4GgYIW6dwOY9civwd6w03IO8XKHUkEEWZv5LPb25QPgKOnTRS0cMS9Y_nhh8ZmhCkX_3fQpjfEEDWBYOG2ac6vzWchY7MOz063wH86qEzBJI7RMjU2IJQr7ALSgMWt7hhtpCm6C6x5OviqsplMSC_QuJSe0cmv4I8kWvRrzyd3eSyzTy07eJz1NwfvfUI-dWbP4Psn4w==&c=FhCCkOIvYYd1n5ERqC4UQJQ92XBm42EIAjiGPmuDbHA6UHWvEmU8iQ==&ch=q7bnNjMGPYOwQseDqoM-zEarMOLYj3Tghz-5GbzlrxfddJ6RJ1OxFg==)
Friend, It's no secret that Republican women had a record year in the recent election. Nearly 15 House of Representative seats were flipped from D -> R all across the country. My friend and fellow Congresswoman-elect Young Kim from California's 39th district, won an impressive race against her Democrat opponent. **I look forward to working alongside her in Congress when we are sworn in on January 3rd.** Together, with the help of many other newly elected Republican women and GOP leaders, we will strengthen our job market, economy, improve care for our veterans, reform our education system, lower taxes, and much more. Friend, will you take a moment to congratulate Young Kim and other newly elected conservative women on our victory, and help us take on the far Left in Congress? **[**STAND WITH STEPHANIE AND YOUNG**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3X0jKsm7gDgaDv2rvPValV62qSKpgpwF8rUKcwyH6D-lXKAD_Je3QkHMRj6oI9UB6JbRQUmSOwNRNWbyAxgXpb_pZStNrQsqIlym31MXXU_ZojE5Xdud9BKVmqyu5hkZvYOH-I-nLc_4yS-2ACKBNg9cP_XRt3JcVglaC50lTS0z-MNtGgPemQLhUqz38y7rFpKX4Syh-Pddk4GgYIW6dwOY9civwd6w03IO8XKHUkEEWZv5LPb25QPgKOnTRS0cMS9Y_nhh8ZmhCkX_3fQpjfEEDWBYOG2ac6vzWchY7MOz063wH86qEzBJI7RMjU2IJQr7ALSgMWt7hhtpCm6C6x5OviqsplMSC_QuJSe0cmv4I8kWvRrzyd3eSyzTy07eJz1NwfvfUI-dWbP4Psn4w==&c=FhCCkOIvYYd1n5ERqC4UQJQ92XBm42EIAjiGPmuDbHA6UHWvEmU8iQ==&ch=q7bnNjMGPYOwQseDqoM-zEarMOLYj3Tghz-5GbzlrxfddJ6RJ1OxFg==)** _**SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE WOMEN**_ Despite her narrow majority, Nancy Pelosi's Far Left agenda will not slow down. From a government healthcare takeover to the Green New Deal, all Americans will suffer -- _which is why Young and I will stand on a united front against the Far Left, fighting for hardworking Americans._ **[**STAND WITH STEPHANIE AND YOUNG**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b3X0jKsm7gDgaDv2rvPValV62qSKpgpwF8rUKcwyH6D-lXKAD_Je3QkHMRj6oI9UB6JbRQUmSOwNRNWbyAxgXpb_pZStNrQsqIlym31MXXU_ZojE5Xdud9BKVmqyu5hkZvYOH-I-nLc_4yS-2ACKBNg9cP_XRt3JcVglaC50lTS0z-MNtGgPemQLhUqz38y7rFpKX4Syh-Pddk4GgYIW6dwOY9civwd6w03IO8XKHUkEEWZv5LPb25QPgKOnTRS0cMS9Y_nhh8ZmhCkX_3fQpjfEEDWBYOG2ac6vzWchY7MOz063wH86qEzBJI7RMjU2IJQr7ALSgMWt7hhtpCm6C6x5OviqsplMSC_QuJSe0cmv4I8kWvRrzyd3eSyzTy07eJz1NwfvfUI-dWbP4Psn4w==&c=FhCCkOIvYYd1n5ERqC4UQJQ92XBm42EIAjiGPmuDbHA6UHWvEmU8iQ==&ch=q7bnNjMGPYOwQseDqoM-zEarMOLYj3Tghz-5GbzlrxfddJ6RJ1OxFg==)** **_SUPPORT CONSERVATIVE WOMEN_** With your help, Young and I can take on the Left in Washington, D.C. and prioritize delivering COVID-19 relief bills, aiding small businesses and families, and fighting against dangerous Democratic policies. ## **Larvita**
Our hero from Lynd, MN got a little emotional yesterday on [Facebook live](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6si-bSKjV0U4FsZ_Hjrs6BssccKlMFAui34ALnuzC-anjOA_UB-ZYkVK30INaeVGprJW6_9JGOWQtMF_VEDMj_U&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=2) when she broke the news that a judge ruled in favor of Keith Ellison instead of her freedoms. These robed gangsters are supposed to believe in the rule of law, but they have manipulated the legal system to allow one person to unilaterally infringe on our liberties. But Larvita still won't back down! She won't let anyone stop her from pursuing her American dream. Where's that kind of courage at the Minnesota Capitol?
## **Jane Moss Has a Hearing Today**
Jane, who owns the Boardwalk Bar & Grill in East Grand Forks, will be in court today against Keith Ellison. She has pretty good legal representation and the case is being heard outside of Ramsey County, which puts a couple more things in her favor.
## Please help Jane by contributing to her [legal defense fund](https://www.action4liberty.com/jane_legal_fund?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=3).
Jane also inspired another business owner in town to open up on Wednesday. His name is Joe and he's 19 years old and already owns two restaurants. Governor Walz is literally crushing a young man's dreams and he could not stand back and take it anymore.
## **The ReOpen Tour with Rep-Elect Mortensen**
We went on the road Wednesday and Thursday from Lakeville to East Grand Forks, to support the many restaurants/bars who opened up in defiance of Governor Walz. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6oiei52nUpL_6MSr3MiS1Qv2grrwGhFG4-VqhclupBKH&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=4)
### Here's what we learned from the tour:
1\. Owners were extremely concerned about the financial livelihood of their employees. 2\. The Attorney General and Governor Tim Walz are scrambling to exert their unconstitutional authority. Clearly they’re worried about "We The People" overpowering them. 3\. Governor Walz has lost the consent of the governed in massive numbers. 4\. Every owner sees this fight as critically important for the preservation of our constitutional Republic. 5\. Owners, employees and guests were all willing to risk jail time for what they believe in. **6\. Guests rewarded these brave small business owners** and tipped VERY generously. ********
## **We're Preparing for January**
We helped take out four of Walz' rubber stamp cronies in the November election. So in January, when the new legislature swears in, the math is on our side to finally pass the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution once and for all. Our team is already working on our pressure campaign to make sure we get the votes in January. It's time that Governor Walz' powers get stripped and our freedoms are restored. Help equip our team with the resources we need to win in January! | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=5 "Support Action 4 Liberty") [Support Action 4 Liberty](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=6)
---
Don't have the money, but have the time? If you are serious about volunteering your time, our Field Director would love to connect with you. Please [sign up here](https://www.action4liberty.com/volunteer_end_walz_powers?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=7).
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=what_you_need_to_kno&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Fulton County: Two days left to vote early at State Farm Arena!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32e/34a064cc/1afc474a/7020eaa/951256381/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Early in-person voting in Georgia is now open, and many folks are asking, "Where should I go vote?" For Fulton County voters, State Farm Arena is a convenient (and fun!) choice.You could even say it's a slam dunk! The Atlanta Hawks have again graciously opened State Farm Arena as an early voting site, with free parking, easy MARTA access, and hundreds of machines to serve voters. If you are a Fulton County voter and want to make your voice heard at State Farm Arena, there are TWO DAYS left to vote at this location! **State Farm Arena Early Voting Remaining Dates and Hours:** TODAY, Friday December 18 and tomorrow, Saturday December 19 8:30am to 6:00pm each day. **Driving directions and alternative transportation:** Riding MARTA is an option, and voters can enter State Farm Arena through Gate 4 (MARTA Entrance). State Farm Arena is conveniently located near the GWCC/CNN Center Station located on the Green/Blue (East/West Lines). For more info on safety protocols and how to ride visit [itsmarta.com/howtoride](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32e/34a064cc/1afc474a/7020eab/951256381/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://itsmarta.com/howtoride"). To drive to State Farm Arena, go to 1 State Farm Dr, Atlanta, GA 30303. Please follow signage to appropriate entrances. For directions and more info visit [statefarmarena.com/plan-your-visit/parking-transportation-voting](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32e/34a064cc/1afc474a/7020ea8/951256381/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://statefarmarena.com/plan-your-visit/parking-transportation-voting"). For information on additional locations in Fulton County, including Mercedes-Benz Stadium and other locations that are open beyond Saturday, December 19, go to [iwillvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32e/34a064cc/1afc474a/7020ea9/951256381/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com"). Thanks for being a voter! In solidarity, \- Stacey P.S. Are you a Fulton County voter who requested a mail ballot? Fill it out right away and return it to a drop box in Fulton County. Find a drop box near you at [iwillvote.com/locate](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32e/34a064cc/1afc474a/7020eb6/951256381/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://iwillvote.com/locate"). Not a Fulton County voter? Go to [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa32e/34a064cc/1afc474a/7020eb7/951256381/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com") for information about early voting in your county. |

subject: Did You Hear? Donald Trump Jr. Is Coming To Georgia!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cb3c708fc5e1/tickets-ga-gop-defend-the-majority-rally-with-vice-president-pence-for-senators-david-perdue-and-kelly-loeffler-67103?e=02cd889ad3)
---
|
---
|
---
| Folks,
We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this exciting news. We have another special guest joining us on the campaign trail this weekend. **Donald Trump Jr.** is heading down to Georgia for THREE Defend the Majority Rallies in **Ocilla** , **Brooklet** , and **Ringgold**.
Join us on Friday or Saturday to hear from Donald Trump Jr. and rally behind Senators Perdue and Loeffler as they fight to defend our majority and hold the line in the U.S. Senate. We hope to see you there!
\- Team Perdue

---
|
---
| _**FRIDAY, DECEMBER 18, 2020**_ **Defend the Majority Rally with Donald Trump Jr.** 7:30 pm
Bad Ash Motors
291 Fitzgerald Hwy, Ocilla, GA 31774
---
| [GET OCILLA TICKETS](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a90eae682b&e=02cd889ad3 "GET OCILLA TICKETS")
---
|
---
|
---
| _**SATURDAY, DECEMBER 19, 2020**_ **Defend the Majority Rally with Donald Trump Jr.** 10:00 am
The Cromley Farm
9714 Brooklet-Denmark Road
Brooklet, GA 30415
---

---
|
---
|
---

The Colonnade Center
264 Catoosa Cir, Ringgold, GA 30736
---
| [GET RINGGOLD TICKETS](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cc71c107ab&e=02cd889ad3 "GET RINGGOLD TICKETS")

subject: A unique caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Over the years at your state party chairman, I’ve had the honor of chairing legislative caucuses across Indiana. It’s always a fun process, and....

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/a-unique-caucus?e=1acd9bb3d6)
A Unique Caucus

Over the years at your state party chairman, I’ve had the honor of chairing legislative caucuses across Indiana. It’s always a fun process, and it’s fascinating to help facilitate the process as neighbors come together to fill a legislative vacancy and make sure their voice is heard at the Statehouse.

And on Tuesday night this week, we had a first during my time as chairman. After three rounds of voting, we had a tie between two candidates, at 17-17, with one precinct committeeman not completing their ballot. In this situation, party rules say that the state chairman can break the tie. However, for me, it’s important that the caucus chooses their representative – it’s what makes caucuses so special.

So after one more round of balloting, we had a winner, Joanna King of Middlebury. I’m looking forward to witnessing the work that Rep.-elect King will lead on behalf of her Elkhart County community as part of our strong Republican team in the Indiana House.

If you’d like to watch the caucus and witness the excitement for yourself, you can catch the video here (https://www.facebook.com/indgop/videos/506887933586942?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !
-Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: This week, I had the honor of participating in our state's Electoral College vote on Monday, and casting my vote for President Trump and Vice President Pence!
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was
https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=382230042866678&mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Governor Holcomb's 2021 Next Level Agenda

This week, Governor Holcomb unveiled his 2021 Next Level Agenda (https://www.facebook.com/GovHolcomb/videos/382230042866678?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and as he said he is:

“Making sure Indiana remains a state of opportunity to live, work, play, study and stay...for ALL.”

2020 has been one like no other. Daily predictability and certainty have been replaced with hourly adjustments and audibles. Governor Holcomb is keeping his eye on the ball as he continues to navigate our state through the world's worst pandemic in over a century while looking ahead to his legislative and administrative priorities for 2021.

Governor Holcomb's agenda (https://www.facebook.com/GovHolcomb/videos/382230042866678?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) is based on the same five pillars that have put our state in a position of strength over the last four record-breaking years:

Economy - Cultivating our ecosystem to help others grow
* Pass Indiana's ninth straight balanced budget and carry a prudent reserve balance
* Expand Indiana's successful Manufacturing Readiness Grants (https://www.conexusindiana.com/manufacturing-readiness-grants/?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) -- keeping Indiana the nation's top state per capita for manufacturing
* Stay on track to triple defense investment by 2025
* Increase efforts to make Indiana a destination

Infrastructure - Maintaining what we've got, finishing what we've started, and building the new projects we need
* Grow our nation-leading Next Level Connections broadband program to raise speeds and reach more Hoosiers
* Complete I-69 Section 6 before Gov. Holcomb leaves office
* Obtain record of decision for a new Evansville I-69 bridge
* Continue long-term planning for U.S. 31 and U.S. 30
* Continue Northwest Indiana rail projects - building the West Lake Corridor and double tracking the South Shore Line
* Restart Next Level Trails, subject to funding availability
* Continue efforts to plant 1 million more trees across the state
* Create a comprehensive overview of our state’s housing supply

Education, Training & Workforce Development - Preparing, recruiting, and retaining Indiana's talent
* Ensure 100% funding for K-12 schools for the second half of the school year
* Increase K-12 funding in next biennial budget, and restore higher education funding cut from the pandemic
* Review and reduce unfunded mandates
* Begin assessment of early learning expansion, accountability, transparency, virtual learning
* Attract top teacher talent, build capacity, improve minority teacher recruitment
* Review and consider recommendations of the Next Level Teacher Compensation Commission Report
* Increase minority participation in Workforce Ready and Employer Grant programs
* Recruit service members and veterans to become public safety officers and first responders in Indiana

Public Health - Health is wealth, no matter who you are or where you are in the world
* Protect pregnant workers by providing more workplace accommodations, with the goal of making Indiana the best state in the Midwest for infant mortality by 2024
* Reform long-term healthcare, focusing on outcomes and quality
* Initiating a comprehensive assessment of local health departments and state delivery of public health services, using what we’ve learned during the pandemic

Good Government - Looking ahead how we'll do business post-pandemic
* Expand telemedicine services
* Expand virtual options for public meetings
* Provide businesses and schools with coronavirus liability protection
* Remove barriers for Hoosiers to reinstate their driver’s license – helping Hoosiers find a keep a job
* Improve services and increase opportunity for Indiana's minority populations
* Equip Indiana State Police with body cameras by spring 2021, and complete the outside review of the state's law enforcement academy and agencies
* Establish the state’s first equity data dashboard

“Civility isn’t just an end in itself. It’s not rhetorical, it’s practice. It’s about forging a team, taking advantage of diverse talents and ideas, and getting things done. That’s how we, all of us, will take Indiana and our lives to the Next Level.” – Governor Eric Holcomb

It’s a big undertaking – and it’s going to take the entire team on the court to continue to sink more baskets for Hoosiers. So now and throughout the coming legislative session, please consider sharing this information. A great way is through sharing this video (https://www.facebook.com/GovHolcomb/videos/382230042866678/?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

--> Watch The Full Agenda Rollout Here <-- (https://www.facebook.com/GovHolcomb/videos/382230042866678?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
--> Read the Full 2021 Next Level Agenda Here <-- (https://www.in.gov/gov/governor-holcomb/next-level-agenda/2021-next-level-agenda/?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HolcombForIndiana/?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , Twitter (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/holcombforin/?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Vice President Pence:
Operation Warp Speed Comes to Indiana

This week, the Trump Administration delivered – literally – on Operation Warp Speed, the development of a safe and effective vaccine against COVID-19, as the first vaccine received emergency use authorization from the FDA.

Our Hoosier health care heroes statewide have started to receive the vaccine, and our own Vice President Mike Pence was in Bloomington on Thursday to highlight Hoosiers’ work at Catalent to produce the Moderna vaccine.

--> (https://twitter.com/Mike_Pence/status/1338918697956564992?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) Watch the full Indiana roundtable here! (https://twitter.com/Mike_Pence/status/1338918697956564992?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) <-- (https://twitter.com/Mike_Pence/status/1338918697956564992?mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Indiana’s Electors Cast Vote for President
Trump & Vice President Pence
This week, Indiana’s eleven electors met at the Indiana Statehouse to officially cast their votes for President Trump and Vice President Pence. Chairman Hupfer was one of Indiana’s electors this year.

--> (https://www.c-span.org/video/?507219-1/indiana-electoral-college-vote&live&mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) Watch the full process from the floor of the Indiana House of Representatives here (https://www.c-span.org/video/?507219-1/indiana-electoral-college-vote&live&mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) ! <-- (https://www.c-span.org/video/?507219-1/indiana-electoral-college-vote&live&mc_cid=bc9efa966b&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Swalwell and the Spy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-AatLoazR5H6CeDEgu6U2eIVYyJ_1c5pwE3R7SRvzgpwmk8CNtDO_pWPOz_t641alimIIk7AbaZGBPn_PtmhVb5nqgJuVujZWBxROt0U8QQmiqH3aKWzxEM7lwfZOuQc7hrNUSFyGUroK8S_R2DUwdtfpyFXa6cm3Xjre0Qgf5oedJCpe0Xxag==&c=Hd4W2M7gOinUDEI8SfrxCCmdRiW_a3jV9LGAIGfDViIJDRUPLonbKA==&ch=cFUZqk11hFxApJkAk7j4BqM4Kci4w3Q1FQwWAvjOcvPNryX62LzpfQ==)
---
| Peter,
It's been hard to find any media coverage on Eric Swalwell being infiltrated by a Chinese spy. Swalwell is a member of the Intelligence Committee, put there by Nancy Pelosi. But Swalwell says that Pelosi knew about his contacts with this Chinese spy. He needs to be removed from the House Intelligence Committee.
Eric Swalwell has spent years calling President Trump a Russian spy, distracting from our fight against Chinese intelligence spying on our citizens. Swalwell chose to deflect and attack the President about fake Russian collusion instead of seeing the very real threats around him.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-AatLoazR5H6CeDEgu6U2eIVYyJ_1c5pwE3R7SRvzgpwmk8CNtDO_pWPOz_t641alimIIk7AbaZGBPn_PtmhVb5nqgJuVujZWBxROt0U8QQmiqH3aKWzxEM7lwfZOuQc7hrNUSFyGUroK8S_R2DUwdtfpyFXa6cm3Xjre0Qgf5oedJCpe0Xxag==&c=Hd4W2M7gOinUDEI8SfrxCCmdRiW_a3jV9LGAIGfDViIJDRUPLonbKA==&ch=cFUZqk11hFxApJkAk7j4BqM4Kci4w3Q1FQwWAvjOcvPNryX62LzpfQ==)
---
| | | [STAND UP TO CHINA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-AatLoazR5H6CeDEgu6U2eIVYyJ_1c5pwE3R7SRvzgpwmk8CNtDO_pWPOz_t641alimIIk7AbaZGBPn_PtmhVb5nqgJuVujZWBxROt0U8QQmiqH3aKWzxEM7lwfZOuQc7hrNUSFyGUroK8S_R2DUwdtfpyFXa6cm3Xjre0Qgf5oedJCpe0Xxag==&c=Hd4W2M7gOinUDEI8SfrxCCmdRiW_a3jV9LGAIGfDViIJDRUPLonbKA==&ch=cFUZqk11hFxApJkAk7j4BqM4Kci4w3Q1FQwWAvjOcvPNryX62LzpfQ==)
---
| While Democrats like Eric Swalwell are crying "Russia, Russia," China is targeting our country and our elected officials. Joe Biden and the Democrats are ready to undo all the gains we've made against the Chinese taking advantage of us. Now, they are ready to give our jobs and ideas back to the Chinese.
I am standing up to China and the Democrats who want to tear apart the country over hoaxes like Russian collusion. Since most of Congress will bow down to China, I am going to need your support as I take on the growing threat coming from China.
---
| | | [JOIN GAETZ AND STAND UP TO CHINA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-AatLoazR5H6CeDEgu6U2eIVYyJ_1c5pwE3R7SRvzgpwmk8CNtDO_pWPOz_t641alimIIk7AbaZGBPn_PtmhVb5nqgJuVujZWBxROt0U8QQmiqH3aKWzxEM7lwfZOuQc7hrNUSFyGUroK8S_R2DUwdtfpyFXa6cm3Xjre0Qgf5oedJCpe0Xxag==&c=Hd4W2M7gOinUDEI8SfrxCCmdRiW_a3jV9LGAIGfDViIJDRUPLonbKA==&ch=cFUZqk11hFxApJkAk7j4BqM4Kci4w3Q1FQwWAvjOcvPNryX62LzpfQ==)

| Thanks for your support!
---
|

| Matt Gaetz

_As Attorney General of my home state, we have fought tooth and nail for the conservative policies that Arkansans care about._

clean_body: and she needs YOUR HELP to become the next governor of Arkansas == Friend, My name is Leslie Rutledge. I'm a proud Christian, pro-life, gun-carrying, conservative mom and I 'm running to be the next Governor of the great state of Arkansas. As Attorney General of my home state, we have fought tooth and nail for the conservative policies that Arkansans care about. We've EXPANDED protections for the unborn We've PROTECTED our 2nd Amendment Rights We've LOWERED the prices of prescription drugs == Friend, our promises have never been about political talking points. It 's always about putting people over politics and delivering real results for Arkansans. This won't be an easy fight. The radical left see Arkansas' principled, conservative stands as a THREAT to their future. A full out assault on our way of life is right around the corner -- and we need to start preparing NOW. subject: With your help, we can save American jobs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
It is shameful to sit idly by and watch the livelihoods of countless Americans be destroyed. Take a stand and sign the petition to stop the shutdown. Our small businesses are counting on us.
****

.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVFGxWyQkQdLSBhlDzup_D2kAl5RmykWS30jK1KBKFsulZMfAiloy5lRqEjvep6wqvjvro4W2iNJGHpvu6CRtjswssFs-Fhmuu9ZE4SPg5yZtazP8NAbpG2CAjsROMyQgGT3194yHCa8Keai8YJhAxFn1zLHBR6NaZxWTlj-X_rYe_p-53aks_Kp7QlZ9ez2xUn_ZKi9Dr2zqOOSAF2DwI7Gv93npueefrnDdiAXr3afwydvLWXAABN-PyXDeAhFz9JbBp9mggeSoWtgF5DEKgkW-b-D55rQbLNTEHpEclUkq0apPZMHRQ0DXElhxZ1Tg2whow9d_vvYt6kE48Fn8zWFxthjLidpKkHTyusDpnVzOf42_tyvVz0bAyEyoC3ETa7PFsyOGcTGBX6pWMBAgPAr885WSf_u&c=SIftnZs5hUnf5TkgGPGEelMJpAqI_NYgZJZpF13xB1KYru2I0Kv6dA==&ch=sc0H7pbAtWIBwj3IDCf-74FE_yJYpmHEvrDYf7xokeDxpiYsz0TBrg==)
Friend, I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity.

Instead, I discovered a broken political system taking advantage of the people it was built to serve and found a government failing the people who needed it most. I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill she didn't have the resources to fight.

I've seen first-hand the struggles of small business owners. And now, their plight is far worse. Across the nation, small businesses are being forced to close their doors. Countless have shut down for good causing even more Americans have lost their jobs.

It's time to say enough is enough.
| **STOP THE SHUTDOWN
SAVE SMALL BUSINESS** | **[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVFGxWyQkQdLSBhlDzup_D2kAl5RmykWS30jK1KBKFsulZMfAiloy5lRqEjvep6wqvjvro4W2iNJGHpvu6CRtjswssFs-Fhmuu9ZE4SPg5yZtazP8NAbpG2CAjsROMyQgGT3194yHCa8Keai8YJhAxFn1zLHBR6NaZxWTlj-X_rYe_p-53aks_Kp7QlZ9ez2xUn_ZKi9Dr2zqOOSAF2DwI7Gv93npueefrnDdiAXr3afwydvLWXAABN-PyXDeAhFz9JbBp9mggeSoWtgF5DEKgkW-b-D55rQbLNTEHpEclUkq0apPZMHRQ0DXElhxZ1Tg2whow9d_vvYt6kE48Fn8zWFxthjLidpKkHTyusDpnVzOf42_tyvVz0bAyEyoC3ETa7PFsyOGcTGBX6pWMBAgPAr885WSf_u&c=SIftnZs5hUnf5TkgGPGEelMJpAqI_NYgZJZpF13xB1KYru2I0Kv6dA==&ch=sc0H7pbAtWIBwj3IDCf-74FE_yJYpmHEvrDYf7xokeDxpiYsz0TBrg==)**[SIGN THE PETITION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qVFGxWyQkQdLSBhlDzup_D2kAl5RmykWS30jK1KBKFsulZMfAiloy5lRqEjvep6wqvjvro4W2iNJGHpvu6CRtjswssFs-Fhmuu9ZE4SPg5yZtazP8NAbpG2CAjsROMyQgGT3194yHCa8Keai8YJhAxFn1zLHBR6NaZxWTlj-X_rYe_p-53aks_Kp7QlZ9ez2xUn_ZKi9Dr2zqOOSAF2DwI7Gv93npueefrnDdiAXr3afwydvLWXAABN-PyXDeAhFz9JbBp9mggeSoWtgF5DEKgkW-b-D55rQbLNTEHpEclUkq0apPZMHRQ0DXElhxZ1Tg2whow9d_vvYt6kE48Fn8zWFxthjLidpKkHTyusDpnVzOf42_tyvVz0bAyEyoC3ETa7PFsyOGcTGBX6pWMBAgPAr885WSf_u&c=SIftnZs5hUnf5TkgGPGEelMJpAqI_NYgZJZpF13xB1KYru2I0Kv6dA==&ch=sc0H7pbAtWIBwj3IDCf-74FE_yJYpmHEvrDYf7xokeDxpiYsz0TBrg==)****

It is shameful to sit idly by and watch the livelihoods of countless Americans be destroyed. Take a stand and sign the petition to stop the shutdown. Our small businesses are counting on us.

Thank you,

Michelle Steel

name: Congresswoman-Elect Stephanie Bice
subject: Congratulate a fellow conservative!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am thrilled to start working with Ashley Hinson. &zwnj
Hi Friend, As you know, 2020 was one of the most impressive years for Republican women running for Congress. I am thrilled to be heading to Washington, D.C. alongside another proven conservative and common sense leader in Ashley Hinson from Iowa's 1st district. Ashley was able to defeat the Democratic incumbent due to the strength of grassroots supporters and loyal conservatives who wanted a change in Congress. Ashley and I were among the 10 Republican women who flipped Democrat held seats, and I could not be more honored to join her in the important fight to preserve our conservative values. name: Tim Scott (iPhone)
subject: Troubling news, please open Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Look, I get it. You have been receiving lots of emails and text messages asking for your support over the last few weeks. You have been one of my most loyal supporters and wanted to drop a quick note just to say THANK YOU.
Friend,

Look, I get it. You have been receiving lots of emails and text messages asking for your support over the last few weeks.

You have been one of my most loyal supporters and wanted to drop a quick note just to say THANK YOU.

I am grateful for every donation, every prayer and every action you have taken to help protect the Senate Majority.

The Senate runoffs in Georgia are TIED and the far-Left is pulling out all the stops to FLIP the Senate.

On my recent trip to campaign in Georgia, I was inspired to see so many committed conservatives working together to hold the line and defend our Senate majority.

Friend, I know you may not be able to make it to Georgia to knock on doors or make phone calls-- _**but your support over the last few months has been just as important.**_

We are in the home stretch and I didn't want one more day to pass without officially saying THANK YOU.

Tim Scott

P.S. If you'd like to chip in again to help Protect our Senate Majority, please use this exclusive link: [**https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/december-thank-you/**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/december-thank-you/?utm_campaign=20201219_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1043931-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20201219_thank-you-first-name/).

name: Tim Burchett
subject: The Left Comes for Honest Abe 👎
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=88f0874b728d48d687f64762c4f563a3&_e=8m7asbbaYtkjZ0vRF3IvuSA-sLxcRZUxq2SladvemcEGVp2gq7PHpDU1Xe24c3FcsiH7FQy7PZZpofIlJm79PSYnSk7PGX_nAB0M1iSf2aJl7_G0JSzvBQWkCRZGS_UwtEqnAPfdmwtXn2hv0iVRaFyAgxjdwk_2nfMTXQd1UCXdlx-49uuqxJMql0ZsHpLrSM0STFzI3x3fx0dCzvtYfbMVAngcbl9xF57R4fWxFj7ZDZP1dT7q5gjRZ3Ue7z78p3yRO_zDuO2H-xJ2BJxAohLmzjOqYw1D2TSTknBzmCY%3D) **The Left Comes for Honest Abe 👎** You can’t make this stuff up. After canceling Christopher Columbus and George Washington, the “woke” left is coming after Abraham Lincoln. According to the [Daily Caller](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=88f0874b728d48d687f64762c4f563a3&_e=8m7asbbaYtkjZ0vRF3IvuWYZT-Hu_zBgFN2H1_4BJkuObzvJmgFP36lFQIcMl1e9BbWMHLprN0UReDpfwbeAlSaHErms4v1XbFkHj1oVLsQXulZiXjFZIgXZ-pSYsYjKjYNURtvQ4rzqSzDddEmmFo-K-cD46px4ow9wD72SljVXE7hOn-m6tLPkY7R7_wgjsecLKHwyG682B3edMHLIzEFDvFiQyqwWWwudYa_968SbgqksRtdBoRw9xxWcbDhU60Xf_VfDXO0jbQjfpEKwvjNvGJf5LsIcam3hK_I3Bd_dHIcz3kGgJPXCpabyL5SNPluzasMDYTeybUk4vAID7RdlU61T85wmCmTLzYwsx_8%3D), a San Francisco school district recommended renaming Abraham Lincoln High School because he "did not show through policy or rhetoric that Black lives ever mattered." Welcome to woketopia! Now, I’m sure Honest Abe wasn’t perfect, but we’re talking about a president who literally gave his life to end slavery. We should be celebrating Abraham Lincoln’s legacy, not tearing it down. Shame on the left. ** ** **→ Read more:** Boston Arts Commission votes to remove Abraham Lincoln statue ([Daily Caller](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=88f0874b728d48d687f64762c4f563a3&_e=8m7asbbaYtkjZ0vRF3IvuWYZT-Hu_zBgFN2H1_4BJkuEu223jFFLMVByCqRE03kLYzFK_-VIYqe-2rT6JrjN7ay7X4oX1AyAYNmkVA4GvmhJy08HPUN2GJQxapVKPfo-g4R47InViQDqaYzcqbVThTjS_JhfVqNKCLCm1Y25_fr0guq5keKAdchf-711qPADLi0u-ZCJoooV_dFWpj0qt4vw9TgAesOwmf8dO63KDHYUWlnFN8HriKbkxPhh2E0Z_kXWE_Nz-rW6uRDWiI0N5BZkLQGfS7wkFmdva2xWGsjn0PpuVZUo8u-VKcPqehQBAg_uQ5-TlSdItl-Akh62cGqP7s94M4XrtjoX7ECX-Yc%3D)) **→ Read more:** Abe Lincoln is next on the cancel culture chopping block ([_Forbes_](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=88f0874b728d48d687f64762c4f563a3&_e=8m7asbbaYtkjZ0vRF3IvuegTVEx7XBEFznbMBmUw2-JM0rFuwm5myRM1RQAhuCe8JdPmr0645jgie6mHot3sO-3qSlzm5i0wO9ltyBTo_6BlVqVvaOEAyqSbZIydedNRVWB8A7v-t3Vv1_oiLrBhcjsugGJ09cBZYwQUoRTd__vHC_2AgGco3wp_UzzlbAbhPSci8I8CiLXSSRqh8wBgA2GkwVHLa8MyrXiOuP2kP1XS5d1wksqblNlxUbCJJ2IRZU0ACVhhjwLycvUSyq0ND_dgWzKTMO5lB5mXV-L4kDq9zGRaXx95VwAiW-6EdBpyxlG_LCdtvW66EHHaQtwqgFFlVIRswhum5KzBis7IGKn7iK1xFJOG92VZQQYxAYwoOD2q61-ravqmbfiGv10z1g%3D%3D)) | |

**Three Cheers for the Alcoa Tornadoes 🏈🌪**
They say, if it ain’t broke, don’t break it. The Alcoa Tornadoes took the saying to heart, [winning](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=88f0874b728d48d687f64762c4f563a3&_e=8m7asbbaYtkjZ0vRF3Ivud86tfClcennJv49uA0SBEy6okO3BwNieI6ynCkCA0c8bTX1PiJCkpFsd75BDAYMUGwIRCnsp0BPdpPME6o9kRCrNGY4WFt5oBohTbFOWikGNXM8FVTEkxGPzOU2U_FAobQMWfgtNYIaSK5IUg35Ne4e-4J5tK_cjjotKo6-hbE6zejHY67Za2yY4hr1nVPfEaD05sONRwKOgE-WVJ44yuEbxensmRwJRsiKu9dFSHT1QMwXaLriwU-eC540HhYwJhKQdFpIvXFuZX-LrIDSyVVMgV6MpwKFrkQUZUtnx3VMZDUZ4PoelAej_MOPZJj72HDrJzvDPytcLmMJTi-4EX0%3D) the Class-3A Blue Cross Bowl game this month and clinching their 18th high school state championship and sixth consecutive title. Eighteen! That is the most wins in Tennessee high school football history.

I’m all for being a good sport, but we East Tennesseans take our football seriously. Allow me a few moments to celebrate East Tennessee’s dominance.

subject: Congratulate Deb Haaland on her historic nomination >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tfsWONjOPRyylvW9QV2mMETv6m9sFS1Lv0ym-5Mna3I=/cKKA9emB0kZidLArjGBZ2DOTdt0g_viDQYUZXfRjtV4=)
Yesterday, President-elect Joe Biden nominated Rep. Deb Haaland to head the Interior Department under his administration. As Interior Secretary, Haaland will become the **first ever** Native American to hold a cabinet secretary position -- an achievement that is _long_ overdue.
As Secretary of the Interior, Deb Haaland will oversee an agency with a historically-destructive relationship towards Native American people. With Deb at the helm, however, the Department of the Interior -- an agency responsible for _500 million_ acres of public lands -- will _protect_ our natural resources, instead of exploiting them.
**[Help us congratulate Deb Haaland by signing our card>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/tfsWONjOPRyylvW9QV2mMETv6m9sFS1Lv0ym-5Mna3I=/NYp4G3rVBUsaM3O3lpuVHn5u6EL86oG7wka_RnMJcmQ=) **
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tfsWONjOPRyylvW9QV2mMETv6m9sFS1Lv0ym-5Mna3I=/OtleCq8pXCEEZHaKcMdWWwr7jMg8OPJOoEdS9FZ8pSI=)
For the past four years, we've witnessed as the Trump Administration has refused to take climate change seriously. Thankfully, that era is almost over.
Not only does Deb Haaland _believe_ in climate science, but she will actively work to reverse the damage done by the previous administration. We could not think of a better person for the job of Interior Secretary and we cannot wait to see what she does in the role!
[**Will you congratulate Deb on her historic achievement by adding your name to our card?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/tfsWONjOPRyylvW9QV2mMETv6m9sFS1Lv0ym-5Mna3I=/NYp4G3rVBUsaM3O3lpuVHn5u6EL86oG7wka_RnMJcmQ=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/tfsWONjOPRyylvW9QV2mMETv6m9sFS1Lv0ym-5Mna3I=/OtleCq8pXCEEZHaKcMdWWwr7jMg8OPJOoEdS9FZ8pSI=)
Thank you!!
_\-- Team S anchez_

name: Kevin Hern
subject: I owe everything to America
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
I grew up in poverty and made a success of my life. I want that for ALL Americans. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fb7d653f840e573b/ffd5efb803620139c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, I just want to make sure you saw my recent op-ed piece featured on Fox News. I felt inspired recently by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to share my own story of rising out of poverty. **[READ THE ARTICLE NOW>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fb7d653f840e573b/7ad866526c24b58dc3d6b838967d376c/34143)** AOC and I both come from humble backgrounds and worked hard in the food service industry to make to where we are today. That’s what’s beautiful about America! The difference is, AOC is promoting socialism, which will slam the door to any other American who wants to work their way out of poverty to a better life. **Hard work means nothing when citizens face a government who chooses the winners and losers. Only capitalism has been able to create the kind of opportunities in America that too many people now take for granted.** When I was a child, my family was often without electricity or running water, because my parents couldn’t afford to pay the bills. I never knew if dinner would be on the table or not. Now I own a successful, multi-million-dollar business and employ hundreds of hardworking people. Only in this great country can a person grow up dirt poor and achieve tremendous success later in life through hard work and dedication. I hope you’ll take a moment to read more of my story by [**CLICKING HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fb7d653f840e573b/f802a212d1d889fdc3d6b838967d376c/34143). And please, if you’re able, [**chip in so that I can continue fighting for these same opportunities for all Oklahomans and Americans**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fb7d653f840e573b/2e1e7b8bf51335bfc3d6b838967d376c/34143). Thanks so much for reading and sharing. I’ll keep up the good fight in Congress so that every American has the same opportunities in the future that I had 40 years ago. -Kevin Hern [**DONATE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/fb7d653f840e573b/0f81dd90c8c573a2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) id:2020-12-15-16:49:35:778t Paid For By Hern For Congress

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: The State Department *is* a climate department
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Rejoining the Paris Climate Agreement is just the start.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM) Friend, It is time to reengage American global leadership to defeat the climate crisis, and President-elect Biden recognizes the urgency of that mission. By naming former Secretary of State John Kerry—a key architect of the Paris Climate Agreement—as the first-ever U.S. climate envoy, Biden has made a historic commitment to elevating climate in America's foreign policy. The president-elect has already declared that he'll recommit the U.S. to the Paris Agreement on Day One of his presidency—but there's more his administration must do to make our country an international leader on climate. In fact, we've laid out five concrete steps that the State Department can take to do just that. **[Will you donate today to "adopt" the State Department? Your contribution will help us urge new leaders of the State Department to act on their responsibility to lead the world in a climate mobilization.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1346?t=3&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM)** | [🌎 DONATE TO "ADOPT" THE STATE DEPARTMENT 🌎 ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1346?t=4&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM)
---
Climate change is deeply intertwined with foreign policy and national security, which is why the State Department's role is so critical.
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1346?t=5&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM)
Deferring bold climate action to the future will exacerbate the world's droughts and wildfires and bring on humanitarian crises even more severe than those the world is already enduring. It also means potentially losing the opportunity to jump-start the economy by investing in clean energy projects that will put millions of people to work.
The State Department will play a crucial role in the all-out national mobilization we need to defeat the climate crisis and to build a just and thriving clean energy economy.
And you, friend, can play a crucial role in making sure we get the word out.
**[Donate today to "adopt" the State Department and power our work as we urge the next State Department to do its part to build a just, inclusive clean energy future for the world.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1346?t=6&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM)**
Thank you,
Jamal Raad
Co-Founder and Campaign Director, Evergreen
[DONATE ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1346?t=7&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=5274%2E53494%2E0YyZLM). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Empowers Georgia Voters to Take a Stand
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=342A776A20A3598)
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE EMPOWERS CITIZENS TO ENGAGE IN GEORGIA RUNOFF ELECTIONS

---
| | Today, True the Vote assisted concerned Georgia voters in taking a stand for the sanctity of every legal vote. We partnered with voters representing all 159 Georgia counties to submit [364,541 Elector Challenges](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYW5zLWluLWV2ZXJ5LWNvdW50eS10by1wcmVlbXB0aXZlbHktY2hhbGxlbmdlLTM2NDU0MS1wb3RlbnRpYWxseS1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=342A776A20A3608) in a citizen-led effort to challenge potentially ineligible voters and reinforce election integrity in the upcoming Senate runoff elections.

An Elector Challenge is a unique feature in Georgia law, which allows a voter to challenge the eligibility of any other voters in his or her county if probable cause exists to show that the challenged voter does not meet the qualifications legally required to cast a ballot. It represents one of the few vehicles that states have to update voter rolls ahead of an election without compromising any legitimate voters’ right to have their vote counted. This landmark coordinated challenge is the result of True the Vote’s voter registry research, which identified 124,114 registered voters who no longer reside in the county of record and 240,427 voters who no longer reside in the state of Georgia, according to filings with the United States Postal Service National Change of Address (NCOA) and other supporting commercial databases.

This historic challenge marks the beginning of the great awakening of American voters to serve our democracy and restore faith in our elections by getting involved in the process.

This is the power of citizen engagement and the core of what True the Vote exists to do in our pursuit of free, fair, and secure elections.

---
| | [ READ MORE ](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXBhcnRuZXJzLXdpdGgtZ2VvcmdpYW5zLWluLWV2ZXJ5LWNvdW50eS10by1wcmVlbXB0aXZlbHktY2hhbGxlbmdlLTM2NDU0MS1wb3RlbnRpYWxseS1pbmVsaWdpYmxlLXZvdGVycyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=342A776A20A3608)
---
| | Feel free to share this news with other Americans concerned with election integrity and security in the aftermath of the November election. Together we can improve the integrity of our election process and restore the faith of voters in Georgia and beyond.

Onward,

\- The True the Vote Team

---

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: this is how we build One Indiana for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We talk a lot about building One Indiana for All here at the Holcomb Crew, and now we’re putting it into action. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bc9b961029234d04834edbe25da0c898&_e=pKOZhKVLoVPASCAFUQ7thPP99_kJEwc9t7S9Y9elq1B2OVYHNFYlHJ04fA8-raBDs-QsafX8BRZ853S9MCG_tW_hgm1hZ1HoU9gtF9FiGmQ0zggQ8gC1K_Q1O4iFNArk3NX81HJRZudCyhlNJeHeNwUanqi0SSztvriDTiPDDT1FnqGivEG1CoeMUgcUP4VjjpXU7LNU2b6FqoHhJJCdr8Ay7xYUJ6j2eUWQhOUHGQITF1G9mn4E_NAMUnNkEWlk5OUalhQVkfSSuAefDzVnSLxR56CouDaCH4OL1y1pRP4Q4xWkq9pfuTvm4_X8ofLMK4k5HNA1owM9r2tC3188EAjaJM91aRfHzMlL3EWQY5preQ3pujhSSCTE0JM9uBdR9VQ8wOzCxFYPrTo_6kT3bX8cQkEbXRzpvW66SBqH2Tkm3_0R0Q1NVoMs-vy4pL7BeW0isFs-ZuQpxjsHkOiVixtxk0krtJ1dQ-hLCLpLFYo%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

We talk a lot about building One Indiana for All here at the Holcomb Crew. And yesterday, Governor Holcomb laid out exactly how we’re going to work toward One Indiana for All in 2021.

This plan is bold...and just like Governor Holcomb, it’s focused on solutions for Indiana’s greatest challenges.

_**“[We’re] making sure Indiana remains a state of opportunity to live, work, play, study and stay...for ALL.” - Governor Eric Holcomb**_

Indiana is continuing to fight the COVID-19 pandemic and keep Hoosiers safe, but there’s light at the end of the tunnel and we’re looking forward to the future.

Governor Holcomb is laser-focused on the same five pillars that put Indiana into a position of strength in the first place: **our economy; our infrastructure; our education, training, and workforce development; our public health; and our commitment to good government for ALL.**

You can watch Governor Holcomb lay out his 2021 agenda below ⬇️⬇️
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bc9b961029234d04834edbe25da0c898&_e=pKOZhKVLoVPASCAFUQ7thPP99_kJEwc9t7S9Y9elq1B2OVYHNFYlHJ04fA8-raBDs-QsafX8BRZ853S9MCG_tW_hgm1hZ1HoU9gtF9FiGmQ0zggQ8gC1K_Q1O4iFNArk3NX81HJRZudCyhlNJeHeNwUanqi0SSztvriDTiPDDT1FnqGivEG1CoeMUgcUP4VjjpXU7LNU2b6FqoHhJJCdr8Ay7xYUJ6j2eUWQhOUHGQITF1G9mn4E_NAMUnNkEWlk5OUalhQVkfSSuAefDzVnSMEDQg1ayfaKyuC4na8p3QeJwQnii0G6SNr4u3BHiyKePdLoZpzSKqy6q6QN-TpYrBalasxs94MX0uHT5q3wmgpcFDwswA8sjInGw8RKJTQnNACMQBBA4ZzyNiivzIwuBnGWI8t6Najrg39AUMoeb0FgfV0n3FVxHgq_6c2Ug2Eoacae6c1hVDgzV85yeJKDjhDW7rvY5x_O5Q8yBVBGrmM%3D)
[**Watch and Share**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bc9b961029234d04834edbe25da0c898&_e=pKOZhKVLoVPASCAFUQ7thPP99_kJEwc9t7S9Y9elq1B2OVYHNFYlHJ04fA8-raBDs-QsafX8BRZ853S9MCG_tW_hgm1hZ1HoU9gtF9FiGmQ0zggQ8gC1K_Q1O4iFNArk3NX81HJRZudCyhlNJeHeNwUanqi0SSztvriDTiPDDT1FnqGivEG1CoeMUgcUP4VjjpXU7LNU2b6FqoHhJJCdr8Ay7xYUJ6j2eUWQhOUHGQITF1G9mn4E_NAMUnNkEWlk5OUalhQVkfSSuAefDzVnSNfTcEj0Nx04OveRz7TxeHBAO9LYHXYcSd4tHzkGxBE28rCuQ3xXsjf8spKo7WWBF1RaRQs0dqLAkOOzo6KU829q9htUS-vM5GAozgFkTXuzsrRNsDhKabsgmjUWvjpKQxXE7IPOoJm81c4VYDFO4zeUoOKI4yT4ro7S-EMVharisqAex_EH55v6kr2xSFEu3AKwQl6J93AF6VO5tQpdGwc%3D)
The 2021 agenda is hard to share all in one email, but you can **[check out all of the nitty-gritty details about how we’re building One Indiana for All right here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bc9b961029234d04834edbe25da0c898&_e=pKOZhKVLoVPASCAFUQ7thFSWLBijVtdpGdO3ryk58HpEmEjZROxsffDu7LvElVcf6E-SEFrFpghrKT0ULL53s27UUFWofwlpqb4v6uQx9nCUIDO8jTn4Cj1nzdrkXWSeO49lruowi7yIp1uFgIK0VvTh8ca0xHDDCyLNY0U4OCkkGvtCT2f02vxOt5KYq30iioWwZXSAiOTHzQhhE346R7jTQC8dUzCz5AOOsimIUfSQTpeKnSvP5nfPH-hXSz9PlACzmapCWUB3G8og7DPyAqKxwn4MIcsbbgoPAmwpkpJBxeXlVA13MIu-EWm9LZW0OeNgs2R1m61CH5hvDacx-2NCWUNoc-EoECB9stfXsJJ61Vw6HUvdm44ECdgDQC0rXQuiktrri63bmJUmwwMw22NVCRuc3PmIp04mRIxzHIk8OQdFZ7dFUw7Tz3WqlMYhiSyMLqAHyLKoea2zkNKHFnI6gxPwOM_OOe7lwozBj1vETXt3VYlQz5vjmxYaql3JQNFjWxrDADb3cDFYaUiXxQ%3D%3D)**

It’s all about creating more opportunity for ALL Hoosiers, continuing to lead the nation in crucial areas like infrastructure, and helping our economy break records again. We’re addressing our biggest challenges -- like continuing to manage our way through this pandemic, making sure our schools are fully-funded, and looking at ways to address teacher compensation. And we’re taking care of the basics, like passing Indiana’s ninth straight balanced budget.

We’re taking an ambitious approach to this challenge and we’re confident that we can deliver for ALL Hoosiers, but we need to embrace civility, community, and teamwork.

**“Civility isn’t just an end in itself. It’s not rhetorical, it’s practice. It’s about forging a team, taking advantage of diverse talents and ideas, and getting things done. That’s how we, all of us, will take Indiana and our lives to the Next Level.” – Governor Eric Holcomb**

Friend, we know this is a big undertaking – and we’re going to need your support every step of the way.

_If you want to help us work toward One Indiana for ALL, please watch Governor Holcomb lay out his 2021 agenda, and share the video with your friends and family on social media! _

[**Watch and Share**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bc9b961029234d04834edbe25da0c898&_e=pKOZhKVLoVPASCAFUQ7thPP99_kJEwc9t7S9Y9elq1B2OVYHNFYlHJ04fA8-raBDs-QsafX8BRZ853S9MCG_tW_hgm1hZ1HoU9gtF9FiGmQ0zggQ8gC1K_Q1O4iFNArk3NX81HJRZudCyhlNJeHeNwUanqi0SSztvriDTiPDDT1FnqGivEG1CoeMUgcUP4VjjpXU7LNU2b6FqoHhJJCdr8Ay7xYUJ6j2eUWQhOUHGQITF1G9mn4E_NAMUnNkEWlk5OUalhQVkfSSuAefDzVnSIW85cQW_2ATrVlCS6nEIMt3AhvWtyG8SPopumlmEIIO_OzjZAewRAj-Hxk1a_wfyB4Cgou5o-mjPqyI6jUeUQ6KjvOIOuxtP5B32b3Q39AJHSkWcNQ9cdtb20xDENku1yix9aQl18rPzRyETNfq0-yyWmz17elcWysNrvoB9oDA34_1s6M43qt-Oh_3qwA0sjTkse4nPJCH8LuO2Bi8sBI%3D)
Thank you for your support,

Holcomb Crew

| Kelly and David have also stood strong for Georgia's conservative values. In the face of Cleveland's decision to [rename](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LknpvV-nwWLMVLCYW8oSmSOxZH23xx_IApxPAHRQNaVbg3hwy6kZ0sQoANgYvV-4d_IueQ0sAgLfBvWXjkeTQSIzZ7K1BPRGXe-zd3HTWOpkENm5n-lh1DiCe4pcSoOvAGMdyaf7mHY2pO8oikFim66MJSZR6YtudlzO_FpuLxn1cC8Mwj9qJt78K7hca8JMFd9SnhBxWk43BF5RSy_rK54ntqN0rfN83Qzkt_sqEZ_KDx6iRLO5GBZDhkRabWGuIU7of_eRSNq8nb0yplhDVA==&c=NPJAzBUt1TucQMoOGLYSQZJSR8dHWjFirbR3Y_UuX7MfiZQBBV11Kg==&ch=L-WATV9-D9lOv2QImAUL6dtTsk5U0CwFM1SVuZYz8fcIenFQ6itt2A==) the Indians' baseball team, Kelly and David [pushed back](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LknpvV-nwWLMVLCYW8oSmSOxZH23xx_IApxPAHRQNaVbg3hwy6kZ0s_18cMj40zXlUOCj5x5PKb7Ujgqw9b7u0rlv8Fe4oS92-Obw3IVvBwU5nEU2nkblQw0Ul21DCB-z1vF-RVQmmunSg_bDdOOrBEobDoHnwnpI7XMITM9H7WkKywLFgeQvMpQiqq0jS3eFvOZa0nz1-4=&c=NPJAzBUt1TucQMoOGLYSQZJSR8dHWjFirbR3Y_UuX7MfiZQBBV11Kg==&ch=L-WATV9-D9lOv2QImAUL6dtTsk5U0CwFM1SVuZYz8fcIenFQ6itt2A==) against the left's radical cancel culture by [taking](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001LknpvV-nwWLMVLCYW8oSmSOxZH23xx_IApxPAHRQNaVbg3hwy6kZ0s_18cMj40zXSlkfMMNxdSw60ONr6tA6YTwMw_KxyYu7U5LUqINDC28gn8UMD1Bibfp9bCsvoU1KS1Zo9NghKbfu6SDw_AtFPb--F95zyEQtl-npNQ0XiYoivfyyqlw51b3NkhoVXOr2XKV65w97npZweyhT-CLJednYKgvmq2k808eV2_0EFByRDPpiJi3wMyEAzWki9AIUircGEyeGLUb9s9RDgffgaQ==&c=NPJAzBUt1TucQMoOGLYSQZJSR8dHWjFirbR3Y_UuX7MfiZQBBV11Kg==&ch=L-WATV9-D9lOv2QImAUL6dtTsk5U0CwFM1SVuZYz8fcIenFQ6itt2A==) a firm stance against any similar action to rename the Atlanta Braves.

subject: Happy Holidays from Team Outvote
body:
This holiday season, we're feeling grateful. | | | | | [View this email in your browser.](https://mailchi.mp/outvote.io/december-18-2020?e=0aad15100c)
---
| | | | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=3a84e70708&e=0aad15100c)
---
| | | | _Organizing for everyone._
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
## **Happy Holidays from Team Outvote**

2020 has been tremendously difficult, but as we reflect on this whirlwind year, we're struck by the impact we made together.

Activists and volunteers inspired us with their perseverance through unprecedented organizing circumstances. We ultimately mobilized over 70 million voters to win back the White House, Senate seats, and countless down-ballot offices.

Our work will never be done (18 days 'til Georgia Election Day!) but we're grateful to be fighting alongside you.

Wishing you and yours the best this holiday season,

\- Team Outvote
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

## **Stay Tuned in 2021 👀**

We have some exciting announcements to make in the next few months, and you'll be the first to know. Back in touch soon 🤫

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: The pause moved us in the right direction. Here's the data.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
After a couple months of our numbers ticking up week after week, we're finally seeing our COVID-19 numbers turn around and start heading in the right direction. This isn't a fluke - it's a trend that's been going on for more than a week now, and we know exactly why.
We know from not just mobility data, but also enforcement data and case investigations, that people took the pause seriously. Our R-value, or rate of spread, has been steadily decreasing since the pause, and is now right around 1, which is great news. I'm pleased that the three-week pause moved us in the right direction.
---
|
---
| Above is a slide showing Rhode Island's percent positive over the last three months. As you can see, after two months of exponential growth, the numbers leveled off around December 2 and have been steadily declining since. And now that we're more than a week into sustained decreases in percent positive, we're also starting to see a leveling-off of hospitalizations. A month ago, I stressed that we were at risk of completely overwhelming our hospital system - which is to say, having more COVID-19 patients than our health care staff is able to care for - near the end of the year.
Because of all of you - because you took the pause seriously over the past few weeks - we have, for now, averted that outcome. However, we still need to be cautious. I want to share with you what our projections are showing.
---
|
---
| Above is a slide showing the trajectory of hospitalizations, as well as three projections of where they could go from here.
In the red is what our model shows would have happened without the effect of the pause. As you can see, the line continues upward, reaching 800 hospitalizations around the beginning of the year. That level of hospitalizations is beyond what our health care staff can handle and would have required us to cancel non-emergency operations and implement crisis standards of care.
The blue shows what the effect of the three-week pause would be if, on Monday, we immediately went right back to where we were before the pause. As you can see, that path does delay the strain on our hospitals for several months, but by early spring it starts growing exponentially again.
Finally, in purple, you'll see the path we announced last week - a three-week pause, followed by a slow dial-up of our economy beginning on Monday. That path has the best outcome - leveling off our hospitalizations in a way that prevents overwhelming our hospital system at any point.
Our pause will end this Sunday as planned, and the [new guidance](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHL4OI42-FVAXShNG4MdFV8ubDcPidNXkA7GSRgbdXOwZl4Vi5WzDvFI3WKul6E7-5feQjVsMZarWx-guBAyU2W7nh5HjYIKXASeT_-1gw-k4jQ8WHkPlCjR9k6BQ_4Lef7fdt_ggjfgjQ2BKu5JHA==&c=pPPsQazB6bqLLzduRmggzNScSLkEF3bQEK_vYFyTCm7J0FCFurm6fg==&ch=ssxV_gw5JoWeHYBo4AngECWva8jfQMxBuhRwNUvu7RzSfSVVTsbUWQ==) we announced last week will take effect on Monday, December 21.
This will only work if we all take the dial-up just as seriously as we took the pause, and that means staying with your household. That's the key - it's all about protecting your household over the next few weeks. If we all think about what we can do in our own lives to protect those we live with this holiday season, we'll stay on that purple path and keep our loved ones safe.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHL4OI42-FVAXShNG4MdFV8ubDcPidNXkA7GSRgbdXOwZl4Vi5WzDo-Akj_CxviJV3GbDk8WFxEpdZhoJV9phgtmccS_DXWuEvAzwhpZb81eGEhiwoDmFQfP5h1ktJWcMM-V0CXxANWqTsk5uV6FBjUt--Q0i1Wuj4aHLL1zC2ZGL2REREroUgboTxiKK4JiKVlNi9sL3trQixSzBYaqobkL8xRpgYKWQDeIFk46YYgWjYfziLKvQCrPLihUmwmkCxpMk1oXzI0vX_okK4nc8vIw_n10V1wAiMeFwXwq1jSLsFl-DW2IoT47i0Mmm97r-bs84z3SAN8=&c=pPPsQazB6bqLLzduRmggzNScSLkEF3bQEK_vYFyTCm7J0FCFurm6fg==&ch=ssxV_gw5JoWeHYBo4AngECWva8jfQMxBuhRwNUvu7RzSfSVVTsbUWQ==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHL4OI42-FVAXShNG4MdFV8ubDcPidNXkA7GSRgbdXOwZl4Vi5WzDmyUDaFRRMQUx63wT4fohP7UVMkeUu5cHGEgdeIf2KflxWFXXJW8oy-dlduvufNCLnalAn8Zy0rM4P4SgHh7HSBxpXa3Xug_BoVlMKxljBWKialsIsDjQJ05h5Gs6GifjxXJXyPQBtlu9DjWlZJg54A=&c=pPPsQazB6bqLLzduRmggzNScSLkEF3bQEK_vYFyTCm7J0FCFurm6fg==&ch=ssxV_gw5JoWeHYBo4AngECWva8jfQMxBuhRwNUvu7RzSfSVVTsbUWQ==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: New hope for the anti-monopoly movement
body:
I’m writing today to share my new, hopeful cover story for The New Republic: “A Blueprint for a Trust-Busting Biden Presidency.” | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e060fb799b96/announcing-my-new-book-break-em-up-5073336?e=e870238275)
---
| |
---
| | | | Hi Peter,

I hope you and your friends and family are well in these tough times. I’m writing today to share my new, hopeful cover story for The New Republic: **“[A Blueprint for a Trust-Busting Biden Presidency](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=0a161f9704&e=e870238275 "https://newrepublic.com/article/160646/biden-antitrust-blueprint-monopoly-busting").”**

As you may have seen, the past few weeks have brought a flurry of exciting, overdue developments in the antimonopoly movement. There are now three strong antitrust suits against Google, and two more against Facebook. Every suit – all five – calls for breakups. It is an amazing way to end the year, and an important foundation for the coming Biden-Harris administration.

Which brings me to my [piece](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=0c204437b2&e=e870238275). As I argue, Joe Biden now has the opportunity to be America’s first trust-busting president in at least 50 years. The nation’s overlapping economic and political crises call for a new crusade against the curse of bigness – and he has both the power and the political support to act. Indeed, President-elect Biden has a unique chance not merely to build back better, as his campaign slogan had it, but to ensure that the American economy actually works for the American people.

I hope you’ll take the time to read it. And if you’re looking for more reasons to feel hope and to share in this new energy, I encourage you to watch [the kickoff of the “Break ‘Em Up” series](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=a5880a9221&e=e870238275) from Economic Liberties and People’s Action. The first event, which featured [Senator Bernie Sanders](https://economicliberties.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee761faee2039d75de6742ac1&id=08067daa24&e=e870238275) was so much fun – and it’s just the start.

Warmly,

_Zephyr Teachout_

---

American Economic Liberties Project1150 Connecticut Ave NW Ste 800Washington, DC 20036-4130

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Moderna COVID Vaccine Gets Key Endorsement; Trump’s Peace Deals Mean the Anti-Israel Boycott Movement is Dead; Trump Signs Bill for Women’s Suffrage | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c2bcef5308&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Moderna COVID Vaccine Gets Key Endorsement — Vaccinations Are Safe and Will End Pandemic**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d809cd6fb&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“The vote Thursday by a U.S. Food and Drug Administration advisory panel to recommend an emergency use authorization for Moderna’s coronavirus vaccine is an important and welcome step in our battle to end the COVID-19 pandemic,” Sally Pipes writes. Vaccinations are already underway for the Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine, as well.

🎬 **WATCH:**[**Vice President Pence receives the Coronavirus vaccine!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4acc95716e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**The COVID-19 Moon Shot: Operation Warp Speed**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0a8c161ed&e=3ee4985eea)
_-RealClearHealth_
“What usually takes up to ten years, America’s innovative bio-pharmaceutical companies accomplished–the design and testing of a new vaccine–in less than ten months,” Jerry Rogers writes. “The Trump administration, the American bio-pharmaceutical industry, medical professionals, and America’s supermarkets, grocers, and pharmacies have all risen to the enormous task of defeating an invisible enemy.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump’s Peace Deals Mean the Anti-Israel Boycott Movement Is Dead**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7ddabf66a6&e=3ee4985eea)
_-New York Post_
“The US-brokered Abraham Accords will almost certainly be remembered as Team Trump’s greatest foreign achievement. Among the as-yet-unappreciated benefits: The accords will utterly delegitimize those in the West who seek to delegitimize Israel, not least the movement to boycott, divest from and sanction the Jewish state,” Sohrab Ahmari writes.
---
|
---
| [**Trump Signs Bill for Women’s Suffrage Monument in Washington, D.C.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0117294c9&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Forbes_
“President Donald Trump signed a bill Thursday authorizing an outdoor federal monument in Washington, D.C., to the women’s suffrage movement to honor the activists who won women the right to vote, his latest move to mark the 100th anniversary of the 19th Amendment,” Carlie Porterfield reports.

🎬 **WATCH:**[**President Trump signs law to honor women’s suffrage**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=936c2278e2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**China Lies About Its Wrongdoing on COVID, Spying, Global Aggression, Pollution and More**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c57895f493&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“China has not taken one step in statecraft that suggests the regime is interested in being a more responsible international partner,” defense expert James Carafano writes. “It is the height of irresponsibility to believe that going easy on the Chinese Communist regime will produce anything other than more deceit and aggression and more disappointment for the free world.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f8f387e99&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=45cbe262c0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=54b7c9833d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20for=20Fair=20Fight?=
subject: 1.1 Million Georgians Have Voted
body:
All Eyes On Georgia | | | [**View this email in your browser**](https://mailchi.mp/momsinoffice/11-million-georgians-have-voted?e=3f151f8b74)
---
# This will be a close one...
My Friend,Polling suggest the Georgia runoff elections will be a tight race with Republican candidates holding a slight advantage as of today. We can win, but victory for Democrats will depend on voter turnout. This runoff election is extraordinary—the outcome of these two races will determine control of the U.S. Senate. Winning these two seats will mean that Joe Biden will work with a Senate dedicated to putting working families first.
**I am asking you directly.**
Every year around this time I think about how lucky I am to be able to provide for my son as a single mother. But the reality in America is that many single mothers can’t say that. **40% of children in America who live with a single mother live in poverty.** Working families and single mothers across the country are struggling today to provide food, shelter and basic needs for their children and Republican Senators blocked the bill this morning to provide $1,200 stimulus checks. It is one week before Christmas and there are just 9 hours left until the government shutdown deadline. 7 days before Christmas the Republican controlled Senate can’t agree on a deal to keep our Government open and keep American families safe. The inaction will continue unless we win these two races in Georgia and flip the Senate. **Republicans only have one advantage—voter suppression.**[**Help me**](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=92808fa8bc&e=3f151f8b74) and Moms in Office support Fair Fight Action so that we can achieve historic voter turnout and win these two races on January 5th. Single mothers working full time in the wealthiest country in the world should not have to call themselves lucky because their hard work can put food on the table. Help me and Fair Fight to flip the Senate so that Joe Biden can carry out his Agenda beginning on day one. Thank you,Simona Grace Founder of Moms in Office
| [CHIP IN](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=e930ff0dcf&e=3f151f8b74)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---|---|---
